title: Ceviche de Pescado
instructions: Accompany with corn and sweet potato.

reviews.text: Fresh and perfect! Added a splash of lime juice and a pinch of chili powder. Also added a dash of hot sauce and topped with extra cilantro.
Added shrimp and scallops. Added extra jalapeno and a pinch of cumin. Served with plantain chips.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
